rules.title: No Hardcoded Secrets
rules.summary: Never commit credentials in source. Read secrets from the environment or a secret manager — never as a literal in code.

rules.title: No Dead Code — Git Is the Backup
rules.summary: Delete commented-out blocks, unreachable code and unused imports/variables/functions. Version control is the history, not comments.

rules.title: XSS-Safe Rendering — Never Inject User Data as HTML
rules.summary: Never assign user-derived data to innerHTML/outerHTML or insertAdjacentHTML. Use textContent / createElement so data stays data.
